title: Harem in the Labyrinth of Another World
sourceNotes: Single-cour anime (12 eps, 2022). Manga adaptation ongoing (current ch. 108 as of June 2026); the anime finishes at ch. 17 / part of ch. 18 (a reader resumes at manga vol. 7 ch. 45), so ch. 1-44 is the anime-covered range. No distinct named story arcs are used by the source; boundaries are broad. The 2-episode OVA (AniList id 151632) bundles bonus/side content and is not included in the cumulative episode count.
